Expected_Result: GET /health returns status=healthy with uptime and version
Pass_Fail_Criteria: HTTP 200 with status=healthy and all components reporting ready

Expected_Result: POST /memory/store with transcript returns memory ID and COMPLETED embedding_status
Pass_Fail_Criteria: HTTP 200 with valid memory ID and embedding_status=COMPLETED and embedding_time_ms > 0

Expected_Result: POST /memory/search after storing a memory returns matching results with score > 0.5
Pass_Fail_Criteria: HTTP 200 with results array length >= 1 and top result score > 0.5

Expected_Result: POST /memory/query with stored context returns natural language answer with citations
Pass_Fail_Criteria: HTTP 200 with non-empty answer and has_evidence=true and citations array length >= 1

Scenario: QR scan detects valid QR code
Expected_Result: POST /qr/scan with base64 QR image returns decoded content and content_type
Pass_Fail_Criteria: HTTP 200 with detections array length >= 1 and non-empty spoken_message

Expected_Result: POST /braille/read with base64 braille image returns recognized text and confidence
Pass_Fail_Criteria: HTTP 200 with non-empty text and confidence > 0.0 and quality_checks present

Expected_Result: POST /debug/perception with base64 image returns detections and obstacles
Pass_Fail_Criteria: HTTP 200 with detections array and obstacles array and processing_time_ms < 500

Expected_Result: POST /face/consent with enabled=true then enabled=false correctly persists state
Pass_Fail_Criteria: HTTP 200 with consent_recorded=true and face_detection_enabled matching request value

Expected_Result: POST /session/create then GET /session/list returns the created session
Pass_Fail_Criteria: HTTP 200 on create with session_id then HTTP 200 on list with sessions containing the created ID

Expected_Result: GET /export/full then POST /import/full with exported data preserves all records
Pass_Fail_Criteria: HTTP 200 on export with non-empty data then HTTP 200 on import with correct counts matching export

Expected_Result: Mock qwen3.5:cloud with 60s delay and verify /memory/query returns fallback response
Pass_Fail_Criteria: Response returned within timeout window with fallback answer from StubLLMClient and no server hang

Expected_Result: Artificially constrain VRAM and submit /debug/perception request
Pass_Fail_Criteria: System falls back to CPU inference or returns error. Process does not crash. Subsequent requests succeed.

Expected_Result: Submit 4 simultaneous /debug/perception requests with valid images
Pass_Fail_Criteria: All 4 requests complete successfully within 4x single-request latency. No deadlock or data corruption.

Scenario: Memory consent gate blocks unauthorized store
Expected_Result: POST /memory/store without prior consent returns error and no data persisted
Pass_Fail_Criteria: HTTP error response with appropriate error code. FAISS index unchanged. No embedding generated.

Expected_Result: Scan QR code then wait past TTL and scan again to verify fresh scan occurs
Pass_Fail_Criteria: First scan returns cached=false. Second scan after TTL returns cached=false with fresh scan result.

Expected_Result: GET /config returns current feature flag values
Pass_Fail_Criteria: HTTP 200 with spatial_perception_enabled and memory_enabled and qr_scanning_enabled booleans present

Expected_Result: GET /audio/health returns audio subsystem status
Pass_Fail_Criteria: HTTP 200 with status field and stt_connected and tts_connected booleans present

Expected_Result: GET /debug/perception without Bearer token returns 401 or 403
Pass_Fail_Criteria: HTTP 401 or 403 when DEBUG_AUTH_TOKEN is set and request lacks valid Authorization header

Scenario: Memory search with time window filter
Expected_Result: POST /memory/search with time_window_days=1 excludes older memories
Pass_Fail_Criteria: HTTP 200 with results containing only memories within the specified time window

Expected_Result: GET /qr/cache after scanning returns cached QR results with TTL info
Pass_Fail_Criteria: HTTP 200 with entries array and total count and ttl_seconds matching configuration
